name: ai-tools
description: 6-phase JS/TS development pipeline for Claude Code - from brainstorm (or investigation) to documentation. Agent-first with skill fallback, schema-validated state, slash commands.
author: Yevhen Kondratyev

skills.name: yk-dev-pipeline
skills.description: Main entry point — auto-routes to agent-orchestrator when agents are available, falls back to skill-based pipeline otherwise

skills.name: yk-agent-orchestrator
skills.description: Agent-first orchestrator (v3.0) — invokes phase agents via Task, runs parallel code review

skills.name: yk-investigation
skills.description: Systematic investigation for bugs and refactoring (direct: 'investigation phase')

skills.name: yk-planning
skills.description: Task breakdown and architecture planning (direct: 'planning phase')

skills.name: yk-implementation
skills.description: Code execution with quality gates (direct: 'implementation phase')

skills.name: yk-documentation
skills.description: Full project documentation generation — works standalone
